name: Horchata - Ground Rice Drink
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rice in a bowl with enough hot water to cover. Let the rice sit overnight.
2. Remove the water from the rice.
3. In a blender, combine 1/2 cup of water and 2 cups milk. Blend until the rice is fully ground up.
4. Mix in 1/4 cup sugar, 1 tsp vanilla, and 1/4 tsp cinnamon. Blend again to ensure all ingredients are well combined.
5. Repeat step 3 with the remaining ingredients.
6. Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh strainer to remove any solids.
7. Serve over ice. Makes 6 glasses.
